config.openAfterGitAction.description: Open the generated content in a new editor tab after a Git action (like generating a commit prompt).
config.exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from the tree view and selection.
config.customPrompts.description: Define your custom prompts here as key-value pairs (Label: Prompt Content).
prompt.gitCommit:
Generate a professional git commit message based on the provided diff.

{{diff}}
selection.clipboardDescription: Select file paths found in the clipboard.
selection.enterExtensions: Enter extensions separated by commas, e.g. ts,js
selection.enterExtensionsRegex: Enter comma-separated regular expressions for extensions, e.g. ^ts$|^tsx$ or ^(ts|js)$
statusbar.warning:
WARNING: Token count (~{0}) exceeds limit ({1}k)!
Total Characters: {2}
config.maxFileSizeKB.description: Threshold for giant file guard (KB). Files exceeding this size will have their content omitted.
config.visibleButtons.description: Select which buttons are visible in the view title bar (Max 6 recommended).
prompt.implementFeature: Implement a new feature based on the requirements and codebase.
prompt.bugFix: Investigate the described bug and provide a fix with explanation and tests.
config.openAfterGenerate.description: Open the generated content in a new editor tab.
config.autoRefreshTree.description: Automatically refresh the file tree when files are created, changed, or deleted.
config.outputFormat.description: Select the output format for the generated content.
config.alwaysAddPatchInstructions.descri: Automatically append patch formatting instructions to the end of generated prompts.
prompt.patchInjection: Important: Use patch mode format when suggesting patches.
config.gitCommitPrompt.description: Prompt template for generating git commit messages. The {{diff}} variable will be replaced with the actual diff. Updated for clarity.
noProjectPathsInClipboard: No project-related paths found in clipboard.
prompt.refactor: Refactor the provided code focusing on readability, maintainability, and efficiency.
prompt.unitTest: Generate unit tests for the provided code, covering edge cases and typical flows.
prompt.codeReview: Provide a code review highlighting issues, improvements, and suggested fixes.
extension.description: ファイルをGUIで選択し、LLMに渡すためのコンテキストを準備します。
config.useNativeEngine.description: パフォーマンス向上のために組み込みエンジンを使用します。
